lang_select.prompt: 请选择语言 / Please select language / សូមជ្រើសរើសភាសា

menu.title:
👋 Hello! Welcome to Boss Hiring.
Please choose a service:

common.upload_fail: ⚠️ Upload failed, please retry or skip
common.timeout_msg: ⏱ Session timed out. Send /start to begin again.
common.submit_fail: ⚠️ Submission failed due to a system error. Please try again later or contact support.

candidate.welcome:
💼 Job Seeker Registration

I will guide you through the form. Send /cancel at any time to cancel.
candidate.step_age: Please select or enter your age:
candidate.step_languages: What languages do you speak? (Multi-select, tap Done when finished)
candidate.step_work_experience:
Please enter up to 3 work experiences.

Each one should include: company name, position, time period, work content, and achievements (STAR format).

Example:
ABC Tech | Sales Supervisor | 2022.03-2024.01 | Developed Cambodia client pipeline, built weekly follow-up process, signed 18 clients in 6 months and increased monthly sales by 35%.
candidate.step_resume: Please upload your resume (PDF / Word / image), or tap Skip:
candidate.step_attachment: Please upload photo(s) / certificate(s), or tap Skip:
candidate.parsing: ⏳ AI is parsing your resume, please wait...
candidate.parse_done: ✅ Parsing complete! Please confirm or update the following information:
candidate.parse_fail: ⚠️ Parsing failed, please fill in manually.
candidate.submit_success: ✅ Your job application has been submitted. A Boss Hiring consultant will review your profile and contact you when a suitable position is available.
candidate.resume_choice: Please choose how to submit your resume:

company.welcome:
🏢 Company Hiring Registration

I will guide you through the form. Send /cancel at any time to cancel.
company.step_jd: Job description (optional, enter details or skip):
company.step_service_fee:
📋 Service Fee Terms

Upon successful placement, the service fee is 80% of the employee's first month salary, payable upon joining.

Please confirm your acceptance:
company.service_fee_declined: Thank you for your inquiry. Please contact our team for further discussion.
company.submit_success: ✅ Your hiring request has been submitted. A Boss Hiring consultant will contact you shortly.

boss_show.intro_body:
"Boss Show" is a recruitment interview program produced by Boss Hiring, showcasing real work environments and company culture.

To apply for collaboration, please tap the button below:
boss_show.submit_success: ✅ Collaboration request submitted! Our team will contact you shortly.

contact.title: 📞 Contact Boss Hiring
